use_codes.desc: INTERMITTENT TREATMENT OF OFF EPISODES IN PATIENTS WITH PARKINSON'S DISEASE TREATED WITH CARBIDOPA/LEVODOPA BY INHALATION OF LEVODOPA POWDER PARTICLES
INTERMITTENT TREATMENT OF OFF EPISODES IN PATIENTS WITH PARKINSON'S DISEASE TREATED WITH CARBIDOPA/LEVODOPA BY INHALATION OF LEVODOPA POWDER PARTICLES THROUGH A SINGLE BREATH ACTIVATED STEP
INTERMITTENT TREATMENT OF OFF EPISODES IN PATIENTS WITH PARKINSON'S DISEASE WITH A POWDER INHALER

indications.text:
INBRIJA is indicated for the intermittent treatment of OFF episodes in patients with Parkinson’s
disease treated with carbidopa/levodopa.

INBRIJA is indicated for the intermittent treatment of OFF episodes in patients with Parkinson’s
disease treated with carbidopa/levodopa.
